notes: v3.0.13 — Free tier weekly word cap (Phase 1 launch gate): tiered banner at 80%/90%/100% with progress bar + paywall modal at 100% (soft mode default — flip to hard via PostHog flag); backspace within 800ms of a conversion now undoes it (Bug #11); recording pill alignment fixed across all 3 states — idle/recording/transcribing now share the same vertical center (Bug #19 — fixed 7 references including 4 paired position-math sites missed in v3.0.12 #14a); after Google OAuth completes, dashboard window now pulls itself to the foreground (Bug #18).
